runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape and Dawn filter mapping both exercise one long-running compute dispatch per benchmark step.
workload.description: Compute contract aligned to Dawn ConcurrentExecutionTest RunSingle with a single heavy compute dispatch.
workload.name: concurrent execution single-dispatch contract
